Amazing Grace
Traditional
[Key: G]

[Verse: Verse 1]
G       G7         C         G
Amazing grace, how sweet the sound
G            Em          D
That saved a wretch like me

[Verse: Verse 2]
G          G7        C      G
I once was lost, but now am found
G              Em    D
Was blind, but now I see

[Chorus]
G   C         G
How sweet the sound

(Repeat chorus)
